title: Unfilled trough, flat touching (cover-protected)
notes: Unfilled trough, flat-touching formation, cover-protected (no solar). Engine treats per IEC 60287-2-1 §2.2.6.2 as in_air with effective ambient = theta_a + Delta-theta_tr = 20 + 28.35 = 48.35 C, plus restricted-convection mounting constants Z=0.97, E=0.80, g=0.23 reflecting cables on trough floor with cover overhead. Trough-air heating Delta-theta_tr depends on cable losses iteratively; here we use the TB 880 reference value (a self-consistent Delta-theta_tr iteration is a future refinement).
